title: astragalus serotinus var. campestris
intro: Astragalus serotinus var. campestris, also known as a type of Astragalus, is a plant species in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant is primarily used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus serotinus var. campestris include reducing fatigue, improving immune function, and potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Astragalus serotinus var. campestris can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
